root_text.an4.20:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.20:1.3: Chandāgatiṁ gacchati, dosāgatiṁ gacchati, mohāgatiṁ gacchati, bhayāgatiṁ gacchati—
root_text.an4.20:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.20:2.1: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an4.20:2.3: Na chandāgatiṁ gacchati, na dosāgatiṁ gacchati, na mohāgatiṁ gacchati, na bhayāgatiṁ gacchati—
root_text.an4.20:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ saggeti.
root_text.an4.20:3.3: Chandā dosā mohā ca bhayā gāmino,
root_text.an4.20:4.3: Dhamme ṭhitā ye na karonti pāpakaṁ,
root_text.an4.20:4.4: Na chandā na dosā na mohā na bhayā ca gāmino;

translation_text.an4.20:1.1: “Mendicants, a meal assigner who has four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.20:1.3: They make decisions prejudiced by favoritism, hostility, stupidity, and cowardice.
translation_text.an4.20:1.4: A meal assigner who has these four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.20:2.1: A meal designator who has four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.20:2.3: They make decisions unprejudiced by favoritism, hostility, stupidity, and cowardice.
translation_text.an4.20:2.4: A meal assigner who has these four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.20:3.1: All those people with unbridled sensuality,
translation_text.an4.20:3.2: unprincipled, with no respect for principle,
translation_text.an4.20:3.3: led astray <j>by favoritism, hostility, stupidity, or cowardice,
translation_text.an4.20:3.4: are called ‘an assembly of the dregs’:
translation_text.an4.20:4.1: that’s what was said by the ascetic who knows.
translation_text.an4.20:4.2: And so those praiseworthy true persons,
translation_text.an4.20:4.3: standing on principle, doing nothing wrong,
translation_text.an4.20:4.4: not led astray <j>by favoritism, hostility, stupidity, or cowardice,
translation_text.an4.20:4.5: are called ‘an assembly of the cream’:
translation_text.an4.20:4.6: that’s what was said by the ascetic who knows.”

variant_text.an4.20:3.3: Chandā dosā mohā ca bhayā gāmino → chandā ca dosā ca bhayā ca gāmino (bj, sya-all, km, pts1ed)
variant_text.an4.20:4.4: na dosā na mohā na bhayā ca gāmino → na chandadosā na bhayā ca gāmino (bj, sya-all, km); na chandā dosā na bhayā ca gāmino (pts1ed)
